choose.otherwise:
<set-variable name="ddPhase1" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase1Response"]).Body.As())" />

  
  
    
      
        <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["status"].Value())" />
        
          @{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["headers"];
            if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
              return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
            }
            return "application/json";
          }
        
        @{
          var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["content"];
          if (content != null) {
            return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
          }
          return "";
        }
      
    
  

  
  

  
  
    
      
        @{
          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Trace-Id"];
          return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
        }
      
      
        @{
          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Parent-Id"];
          return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
        }
      
      
        @{
          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Sampling-Priority"];
          return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
        }
      
      
        @{
          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Origin"];
          return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
        }
      
      
        @{
          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Tags"];
          return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
        }
      
    
  

  
  
    
      
        https://:8080/
        POST
        
          application/json
        
        @{
          var maxSize = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["allowed-body-size"].Value();
          var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
          var b64 = "";
          if (body != null && body.Length > 0) {
            var slice = body.Length > maxSize ? body.Take(maxSize).ToArray() : body;
            b64 = Convert.ToBase64String(slice);
          }
          var addresses = new JObject(new JProperty("body", b64));
          return new JObject(
            new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
            new JProperty("request-id", (string)context.Variables["ddRequestId"]),
            new JProperty("phase", "")
          ).ToString();
        }
      

      
        
          <set-variable name="ddPhase2" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase2Response"]).Body.As())" />
          
            
              
                <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["status"].Value())" />
                
                  @{
                    var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["headers"];
                    if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                      return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                    }
                    return "application/json";
                  }
                
                @{
                  var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["content"];
                  if (content != null) {
                    return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
                  }
                  return "";
                }
